title: Immunohistochemistry (using floating section)
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"a5fo1","text":"- This is an immunohistochemistry protocol used for evaluation of pathology in mouse brain.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9k78t","text":"
","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9lcep","text":"- We successfully detected Gfap, Iba1, CD68, TH and alpha-Syn and phospho S129 alpha synuclein protein expression using this
protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cljm","text":"
","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"evalm","text":"- In this protocol, floating sections are mounted on slides first before starting blocking step. In this way, large number of sections can
be stained more efficiently. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c4umc","text":"

","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text:
{"blocks":[{"key":"eft3o","text":"30 um thickness of floating tissue sections in PBS with 0.1% sodium azide.
","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"52pif","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1fh01","text":"- Washing: Glass Coplin jar","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ernh0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eli5v","text":"- PBST: PBS 1X + 0.05% Tween20 ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7t56d","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bpfr2","text":"- Normal Goat Serum Blocking Solution:  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ahshe","text":"2% goat serum (blocking)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"25v3s","text":"1%BSA (stabilizer)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6jpb2","text":"0.1% cold fish skin gelatin (blocking)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a3e1","text":"0.1% Triton X-100 (penetration enhancer)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a54bj","text":"0.05% Tween 20 (detergent and surface tension reducer)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8ap0l","text":"0.05% sodium azide (preservative)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"12ndp","text":"0.01M PBS, pH 7.2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"an3a3","text":"   Mix well and store at 4 ºC for up to 6 months. steps: Mount floating sections onto slides and dry for 00:30:00 (<45 min), While section drying, PAP pen drawing line and dry 00:05:00 .
PBS rehydrate 00:10:00 , Wash with PBS for 00:05:00 three times.
Blocking sol 500 µL , incubate 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Replace buffer to primary antibody sol, incubate Overnight at 4 °C .
Wash in PBST three times for 00:05:00 , 00:10:00 and 00:05:00 .
Secondary antibody sol, incubate for 01:30:00 at Room temperature .
Wash in PBS three times for 00:05:00 , 00:10:00 and 00:05:00 .
creator: Tae-Un Han
